_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of organizational evaluation and validation requirements
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model evaluation frameworks, including train/validation/test split design, cross-validation, evaluation metric selection, and the conditions under which each metric is appropriate.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI RM domain. Knowledge RM-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-006 (LS, cosine: 0.531), RM-K-010 (RM, cosine: 0.528).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.604). Shared vocabulary: [evaluation, knowledge, validation]. NICE-only terms [organizational, requirements] vs WIDAI-only terms [appropriate, conditions, cross, design, frameworks, metric] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.889 (P=0.922, R=0.858). P exceeds R by 0.064 — the NICE element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of organizational evaluation and validation requirements" and "Knowledge of model evaluation frameworks, including train/validation/test split" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.607 ≈ STS 0.604 (gap 0.003). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [evaluation, knowledge, validation] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.8%. Shared tokens: [evaluation, knowledge, validation]. NICE-only: [organizational, requirements]. WIDAI-only: [appropriate, conditions, cross, design, frameworks, metric].
